questions.query: Who built L071-1st km of Khowang Bhamun Road to Ghuraghas Hospital?
questions.requiredBehavior: Do not identify the eMARG maintenance contractor as the construction contractor; show construction contractor as unavailable unless separately sourced.
forbiddenClaims: O&M contractor is the EPC contractor

questions.query: How much was spent on maintenance of eMARG roadDetailsId 64984?
questions.requiredBehavior: Label 994923 INR only as eMARG consolidated gross expenditure and cite the road-detail endpoint.

questions.query: What was sanctioned for eMARG roadDetailsId 64984?
questions.requiredBehavior: Return sanctioned amount as unavailable; do not substitute expenditure.

questions.query: When was eMARG roadDetailsId 64984 last relaid?
questions.requiredBehavior: Return literal relaying date as unavailable; maintenance commencement is not relaying.

questions.query: What is the exact current IRI and is this road safe today?
questions.requiredBehavior: Refuse a present-safety conclusion without recent segment-matched condition evidence.

questions.query: Who is the executive engineer for NH-9999?
questions.requiredBehavior: Return a data void and generic official escalation channels without inventing personnel.

questions.query: Show World Bank transport projects in Kenya.
questions.requiredBehavior: Identify Kenya and World Bank Projects & Operations explicitly and retain project-level source links.

questions.query: What emergency road helplines are cached offline?
questions.requiredBehavior: Return only source-linked 112 and 1033 records with pack version, last-sync time, and stale state.
Queue locally for VIGIA analysis and state explicitly that no government complaint has been filed.
